title: Cook For Your Husband | #shorts
full_text: Shalabh, how's the food? >> It's fantastic. There's this new Thai place I found. It's really good food. >> Oh, good. >> I was talking to my mother today morning. >> Yeah. >> And she said she's a little concerned about my takeout habit because she thinks it's very unhealthy. >> What does that mean? What do you mean? >> Well, she just thinks that home-cooked food is high quality. You know, you can control the ingredients. She was just worried for my health. >> I'm also worried for your health.
